signals.signal: Dan (RightRev) DMed Akash directly: 'Are we still on for the MoF discussion Wednesday? Jagan wants to join.' — Akash has not replied.
Doug (VP Sales, Delightree) confirmed the ICP workshop tech stack decision is still blocked on Akash — asked if he can get a decision by EOD today.
Justin Moore (Innovius) followed up on sourcing velocity concern from last week — still waiting for Akash's response on how to recalibrate the outbound approach.
